name: effective-delivery
description: Effective software delivery through PR follow-through, optimized GitHub Actions workflow graphs, structured CI evidence, duration-aware waiting, and quiet event-driven observation.

metadata.dailyDriver: Install alongside git-ci-operations when agents must publish pull requests, optimize or repair GitHub Actions, and wait for remote delivery evidence without model-driven polling.
metadata.notFor: Local-only Git changes, generic implementation TDD, language-specific semantic review, or non-GitHub delivery systems without a structured observer.
metadata.scope: Pull-request lifecycle, GitHub Actions triage and optimization, workflow-graph proof, releases, structured CI evidence, duration prediction, and quiet event-driven waiting.
